summary: Iteration 181: Pacco Documenti Enhanced (CAP. 1/2/3) + Smistatore Intelligente - Complete backend testing. All 26 tests passed. PDF structure verified with new chapter format (CAP. 1: STRUTTURE EN 1090, CAP. 2: CANCELLI EN 13241, CAP. 3: RELAZIONE TECNICA). Verbale automation working (ESITO POSITIVO/NEGATIVO). Smistatore endpoints functional. Consumable classification rules verified.

minor.issue: Docstring at top still mentions 'PARTE A/B/C' but implementation uses 'CAP. 1/2/3' - documentation inconsistency

action_items: Optional: Update docstring in pacco_documenti.py to reflect CAP. 1/2/3 structure instead of PARTE A/B/C
critical_code_review_comments: pacco_documenti.py: Well-implemented chapter structure with CAP. 1/2/3 format
Cover page index correctly shows: CAP. 1: STRUTTURE (EN 1090), CAP. 2: CANCELLI (EN 13241), CAP. 3: RELAZIONE TECNICA
Verbale automation: all_ok=True → 'ESITO POSITIVO', all_ok=False → 'ESITO NEGATIVO' with ATTENZIONE warning
Firma tecnica area includes auto-generation disclaimer: 'Documentazione generata automaticamente dal sistema di controllo produzione'
smistatore_intelligente.py: classify_consumable() correctly implements filo ≥1.0mm → EN_1090, <1.0mm → EN_13241, gas → EN_1090
Smistatore endpoints: /analyze/{doc_id}, /index/{commessa_id}, /scorte all functional with proper auth
_page_matches_voce() helper correctly implements Filtro Beltrami for indexed pages
Minimalismo: PDF only generates chapters for existing categories (verified with 4-page PDF)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from iteration 180: commessa with EN_1090 (all_ok=True → ESITO POSITIVO), EN_13241 (all_ok=False → ESITO NEGATIVO), GENERICA voci
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pacco Documenti Enhanced fully implemented with CAP. 1/2/3 structure. Smistatore Intelligente service ready for AI Vision analysis (requires EMERGENT_LLM_KEY). Key endpoints: GET /api/commesse/{id}/pacco-documenti (PDF), POST /api/smistatore/analyze/{doc_id}, GET /api/smistatore/index/{commessa_id}, GET /api/smistatore/scorte. Consumable rules: filo ≥1.0mm → EN_1090, <1.0mm → EN_13241, gas → EN_1090. Page index integration in PDF shows '0 pag. indicizzate' until documents are analyzed with Smistatore.

pdf_chapter_structure.cover_index: ✓ Shows CAP. 1, CAP. 2, CAP. 3 format (not PARTE A/B/C)
pdf_chapter_structure.cap_1_en_1090: ✓ STRUTTURE section with 1.x numbering, certificati 3.1, foto, verbale, ore
pdf_chapter_structure.cap_2_en_13241: ✓ SICUREZZA CANCELLI section with 2.x numbering, foto, verbale, ore
pdf_chapter_structure.cap_3_relazione: ✓ RELAZIONE TECNICA section with 3.x numbering, riepilogo ore

verbale_automation.esito_positivo: ✓ Shown when all checklist items OK (EN 1090 voce)
verbale_automation.esito_negativo: ✓ Shown when checklist has NOK items (EN 13241 voce)
verbale_automation.warning_note: ✓ ATTENZIONE warning present for NOK items

firma_tecnica.disclaimer: ✓ 'Documentazione generata automaticamente dal sistema di controllo produzione'

smistatore_endpoints.GET /api/smistatore/index/{commessa_id}: ✓ Returns structure with total_pages, matched, scorta, consumabili, pages

pdf_content_verified.page_3: CAP. 2: SICUREZZA CANCELLI (EN 13241) - ESITO NEGATIVO + ATTENZIONE
